boundaries: Do not report imported skills as real-life-workflows skills.
Do not treat imported skills as callable or discoverable active skills.
Do not promote imported skills as-is.
Use imported skills only as source evidence for a tracked rewrite or deletion decision.
Future active skills must be rewritten for the real-life-workflows project job and promoted through the canonical skill surface.

affected_surfaces.rule: When asked what skills exist, list canonical callable skills separately from quarantined source evidence.
Load this marker before summarizing imported skill material.
Imported SKILL.md files under this import must remain covered by this marker.
Expose this import only through explicit quarantine inspection, not active skill discovery.
